scripts.test:integration: dotenv -e ../.env.test -- sh -c 'cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait db_test && npm run prisma -- migrate reset --force --skip-generate --skip-seed && npx jest --runInBand --setupFilesAfterEnv ./api/tests/setup.integration.js --testPathPattern=api/tests/integration; EXIT_CODE=$?; docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test:integration:ci: dotenv -e ../.env.test -- sh -c 'cd .. && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --wait db_test && npm run prisma -- migrate reset --force --skip-generate --skip-seed && npx jest --runInBand --setupFilesAfterEnv ./api/tests/setup.integration.js --testPathPattern=api/tests/integration; EXIT_CODE=$?; docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v; exit $EXIT_CODE'
